name: Basket
notes: Razor Page. PageModel: IndexModel.
Auth: public — anonymous users identified by GUID stored in a 10-year essential cookie (Constants.BASKET_COOKIENAME); authenticated users identified by username.
Loads basket via IBasketViewModelService.GetOrCreateBasketForUser(cookieOrUserName) on OnGet.

OnPost(CatalogItemViewModel) — adds a catalog item to the basket; validates item exists via IRepository<CatalogItem>; price resolved server-side from CatalogItem entity (client-supplied price ignored); redirects back to /basket.
OnPostUpdate(IEnumerable<BasketItemViewModel>) — updates all item quantities in batch via IBasketService.SetQuantities; guarded by ModelState.IsValid.
Empty-state: 'Basket is empty.' with no form when BasketModel.Items is empty.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 page component at /basket; Angular BasketService fetches basket via HttpClient from Spring @RestController @GetMapping("/api/basket"); IBasketService and IBasketViewModelService become Spring @Service beans; anonymous basket tracked by session cookie or UUID claim

name: Basket Items Form
notes: POST form. No explicit asp-page — submits to /basket (current page route).
Rendered only when BasketModel.Items is non-empty.
Fields: Items[i].Id (hidden, int) and Items[i].Quantity (number input, min=0) for each row i.
Validation: OnPostUpdate checks ModelState.IsValid; no client-side validation markup.
On Update success: stays on /basket; page re-renders with refreshed quantities and totals.
Also contains [Checkout] anchor (navigation to /basket/checkout) — not a form submit.
javaEquivalent: Angular reactive form with FormArray of FormGroups (one per basket item); on Update submit calls Angular BasketService HTTP PUT /api/basket with quantities array; Spring @RestController @PutMapping; @Valid on @RequestBody DTO

name: Basket Items Table
notes: Renders one row per BasketItemViewModel in BasketModel.Items via @for loop (index-bound for model binding).
Columns: Product image (hidden on screens below lg), Product name, Unit price ($ N2), Quantity (editable number input, min=0), Line total (Quantity × UnitPrice, $ N2, computed in template).
Footer row: 'Total' label and BasketModel.Total() ($ N2) spanning full width.
Row count equals BasketModel.Items.Count; no pagination.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 component with @for over basketItems FormArray; quantity inputs two-way bound via FormControl; line total computed in template; total computed via component method or Angular signal

name: Update Basket Button
notes: Submits to OnPostUpdate handler via asp-page-handler='Update'.
Posts all Items[i].Id and Items[i].Quantity values from the form.
OnPostUpdate calls IBasketService.SetQuantities(basketId, {id: quantity} dictionary); items with quantity 0 are removed.
On success: stays on /basket; page re-renders with updated BasketModel.
javaEquivalent: Angular (ngSubmit) calls Angular BasketService HTTP PUT /api/basket with updated item quantities; Spring @RestController @PutMapping("/api/basket"); on success component reloads basket from service response

name: Checkout Link
notes: Anchor tag. Navigates to /basket/checkout.
Visible only when basket has items (inside the non-empty conditional block, line 14).
Does not submit the basket form — quantity edits are lost if user navigates without clicking [Update] first.
javaEquivalent: Angular routerLink [routerLink]="['/basket/checkout']"; displayed only when basketItems is non-empty via @if
